series_metadata.series_description: Structured interview, assessment and selection documentation for Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) positions. Files may contain proficiency tests, oral and written interviews, various hands-on computer exercises and scoring information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office until updated, then destroy provided no legal action is pending. ; Paper: Retain in office until updated, then destroy provided no legal action is pending., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
